parsed_output.justification: Caitlynn explicitly claimed to be a werewolf during the discussion. Furthermore, Mitchell (claiming Robber) and Alana (claiming Troublemaker) developed a logic chain suggesting that even if roles were swapped during the night, Caitlynn ended up as the werewolf. The other players converged on this conclusion, making Caitlynn the most likely target to help Team Village win.
